task_completion.description: Verify that the new name prefixes have been added to the master data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo master data or settings screen showing 'Mx.', 'Prof.', and 'Engr.' in the list of name prefixes.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new ethnic codes have been added to the master data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo master data or settings screen showing MENA, NHPI, SEA, and MRAC in the list of ethnic codes.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new employment status types have been added to the master data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo master data or settings screen showing 'Seasonal Worker' and 'Fellowship' in the list of employment statuses.

task_completion.description: Verify that Jordan Rivera has been onboarded as a new employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo employee list or employee profile showing Jordan Rivera (EMP021) assigned to the Customer Support department.

task_completion.description: Verify that Rajan Patel has been onboarded as a new employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo employee list or employee profile showing Rajan Patel (EMP022) assigned to the Engineering department.

task_completion.description: Verify that no existing master data was deleted or deactivated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the master data lists showing pre-existing default entries (e.g., standard prefixes, statuses) still present and active alongside the newly added ones.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to add the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web application menus and forms, rather than using terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show data entered into Sentrifugo's input fields, not just the agent viewing the dei_masterdata_update.txt file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing MySQL or other database prompts executing INSERT or UPDATE commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Prefixes: 'Mx.', 'Prof.', 'Engr.'. Expected Ethnic Codes: MENA (Middle Eastern or North African), NHPI (Native Hawaiian or Pacific Islander), SEA (Southeast Asian), MRAC (Multiracial). Expected Employment Statuses: 'Seasonal Worker', 'Fellowship'. Expected Employees: EMP021 (Jordan Rivera, Customer Support), EMP022 (Rajan Patel, Engineering).
